name: ANC_PER_ABS_QUAL_ENTL
description: This table holds information of  the qualified entitlements person is entitled to when recording an absence

columns.Name: PER_ABSENCE_ENTRY_ID
columns.Comments: PER_ABSENCE_ENTRY_ID of the qualification entitlement row

columns.Name: PER_ABS_TYPE_ENTRY_ID
columns.Comments: Per_abs_type_entry_id of the qualification entitlement row

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person id of the qualification entitlement row

columns.Name: PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: Qualification plan id of the qualification entitlement row

columns.Name: ENTL_BAND_DTL_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: Pay factor priority sequence of the qualification entitlement row

columns.Name: PAY_RATE_FACTOR
columns.Comments: Pay factor of the qualification entitlement row

columns.Name: QUALIFIED_ENTITLEMENTS
columns.Comments: Qualified entitlement of the qualification entitlement row

columns.Name: PLAN_PERIOD_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Plan period start date of the qualification entitlement row

columns.Name: PLAN_PERIOD_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Plan period end date of the qualification entitlement row

columns.Name: PLAN_PERIOD_USED_ENTL
columns.Comments: Used entitlements of the qualification entitlement row

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
